markets.question: Ethereum Up or Down - March 12, 9:00AM-9:15AM ET
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the Ethereum price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the ETH/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/eth-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream ETH/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

markets.question: 1H Spread: Knicks (-8.5)
markets.description:
In the first half of the NBA game between Knicks and Jazz, scheduled for March 11 at 9:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Knicks" if the Knicks are winning by 9 or more points at halftime.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Jazz".

The result will be determined based on the score at halftime only.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

events.title: Knicks vs. Jazz
events.description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for March 11 at 9:00PM ET:
If the Knicks win, the market will resolve to "Knicks".
If the Jazz win, the market will resolve to "Jazz".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

markets.question: Spread: Nuggets (-6.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for March 11 at 10:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Nuggets" if the Nuggets win the game by 7 or more points.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Rockets". If the game ends in a tie, this market will resolve to "Rockets".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

events.title: Rockets vs. Nuggets
events.description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for March 11 at 10:00PM ET:
If the Rockets win, the market will resolve to "Rockets".
If the Nuggets win, the market will resolve to "Nuggets".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

markets.question: Rockets vs. Nuggets: O/U 231.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for March 11 at 10:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if the Rockets and Nuggets combine to score 232 or more points in this game.

If the combined total is less than 232, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
